name: playable-runner
description: Single-file Pixi.js playable runner built to match the Playoff reference creative.

scripts.package:submission: npm run build && npm run size && mkdir -p release && cp dist/index.html release/playable-runner.html
scripts.verify:submission: npm test && npm run build && npm run size && playwright test tests/e2e/playable-smoke.spec.js

author: Roxy
